abstract: Maintained by Department of Homeland Security, this API-format dataset captures TSA passenger throughput by airport with pacific basin coverage. Supports campaign analysis, intelligence preparation of the operational environment, and stand-in force employment. Approximately 90,572 records.

title: DOT FMCSA: Ferry Boat Census
abstract: This dataset, maintained by Department of Transportation (DOT/FMCSA), provides annually observations of ferry boat census for the Japan archipelago region. Cited in published BTS, USTRANSCOM, and MARAD freight studies. Approximately 90,680,734 records.

title: DOT MARAD: Rail-Grade Crossing Inventory
abstract: Maintained by Department of Transportation, this CSV-format dataset records rail-grade crossing inventory pertinent to the CONUS-wide theater. Frequently cited in MARFORPAC and INDOPACOM analytic products. Format: CSV; license: CC BY 4.0.

title: CONUS Country Development Cooperation Strategies — USAID Bureau for Asia
abstract: The USAID Bureau for Asia program publishes this dataset, which records country development cooperation strategies pertinent to the CONUS theater. Supports campaign analysis, intelligence preparation of the operational environment, and stand-in force employment. Approximately 3,966,016 records.
agency_full: United States Agency for International Development

title: USDA Crop Yield Forecasts By District — global
abstract: Maintained by Department of Agriculture, this CSV-format dataset provides weekly observations of crop yield forecasts by district for the global region. Useful for OSINT prep, contested-logistics modeling, and HA/DR cell setup. Format: CSV; license: U.S. Government Work (Public Domain).

title: EIA Electricity: International Energy Outlook Scenarios
abstract: Maintained by Energy Information Administration, this CSV-format dataset records international energy outlook scenarios pertinent to the global theater. Frequently cited in MARFORPAC and INDOPACOM analytic products. Format: CSV; license: U.S. Government Work (Public Domain).

title: NOAA Coral Reef Bleaching — CONUS-wide
abstract: Maintained by National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, this CSV-format dataset records coral reef bleaching pertinent to the CONUS-wide theater. Frequently cited in MARFORPAC and INDOPACOM analytic products. Refresh cadence: hourly; latest update 2025-04-01.
